SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAWLEY, MEGAN KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SF TIRE & SERVICE CENTRAL INC $2,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,440.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
